allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const p=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('version:', p.version\); console.log\('exports keys:', Object.keys\(p.exports||{}\).slice\(0,20\)\);")

PowerShell($ok=$false; foreach\($i in 1..20\){ try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:3000/ -TimeoutSec 3; if\($r.StatusCode -eq 200\){ $ok=$true; break } } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 700 } }; "home: $ok")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:3000/mice-configurazione-claude-code -TimeoutSec 60; "status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "toc: $\($r.Content.Contains\('In questa pagina'\)\)"; "footer: $\($r.Content.Contains\('Pagina generata con Creta'\)\)"; "anchor: $\($r.Content.Contains\('id=\\"preparazione\\"'\)\)"; $h = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:3000/ -TimeoutSec 30; "home-search: $\($h.Content.Contains\('Cerca un documento'\)\)"; "home-sezioni: $\($h.Content.Contains\('sezioni'\)\)"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:3000/pagina-inesistente -TimeoutSec 30 } catch { "404: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell(foreach\($s in @\('demo','mice-linee-guida-ai'\)\){ try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "http://localhost:3000/$s" -TimeoutSec 60; "${s}: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "${s}: ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/mice-linee-guida-ai" -UseBasicParsing; $r.StatusCode; if \($r.Content -match 'Capitoli del documento'\) { 'ChapterNav present' } else { 'ChapterNav MISSING' })

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(40\); do { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; break } catch {} } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); if \($r\) { "Server up: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { "Server non raggiungibile" })

PowerShell($j = Get-Content content/pages/mice-configurazione-claude-code.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $j.page | ConvertTo-Json; $k = Get-Content content/pages/mice-linee-guida-ai.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $k.page | ConvertTo-Json; $k.sections.Count)

PowerShell($h = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:3000/; "home: $\($h.StatusCode\), hero=$\($h.Content -match 'diventa'\), marquee=$\($h.Content -match 'creta-marquee'\), indice=$\($h.Content -match 'Indice'\)"; $d = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://localhost:3000/mice-linee-guida-ai; "doc: $\($d.StatusCode\), palette-btn=$\($d.Content -match '⌘K'\)")

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing "http://localhost:3000/api/search"; \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\).docs | ForEach-Object { "$\($_.slug\) — $\($_.readingMinutes\) min — $\($_.sectionCount\) sez" })

PowerShell($deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddSeconds\(30\); do { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800 } } while \(\(Get-Date\) -lt $deadline\); if \($r\) { "UP: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } else { "DOWN" })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("C:\\tmp\\creta-hero.png"\); $rect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle 700, 100, 980, 700; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap 980, 700; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle 0,0,980,700\), $rect, [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\tmp\\creta-hero-right.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\); "ok")

PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force C:\\tmp\\pw | Out-Null; Set-Location C:\\tmp\\pw; npm init -y | Out-Null; npm i playwright-core --no-audit --no-fund 2>$null | Out-Null; "installed: " + \(Test-Path C:\\tmp\\pw\\node_modules\\playwright-core\))

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($name in @\("creta-mice","creta-creta"\)\) { $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("C:\\tmp\\$name.png"\); $rect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle 700, 150, 980, 700; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap 980, 700; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle 0,0,980,700\), $rect, [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\tmp\\$name-crop.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\) }; "ok")

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\tmp\\pw; node shot.js; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($name in @\("creta-mice","creta-creta"\)\) { $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("C:\\tmp\\$name.png"\); $rect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle 700, 0, 980, 700; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap 980, 700; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle 0,0,980,700\), $rect, [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\tmp\\$name-crop.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\) }; "ok")

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\tmp\\pw; node shot.js; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $src = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\("C:\\tmp\\creta-mice.png"\); $rect = New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle 700, 0, 980, 700; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap 980, 700; $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.DrawImage\($src, \(New-Object System.Drawing.Rectangle 0,0,980,700\), $rect, [System.Drawing.GraphicsUnit]::Pixel\); $bmp.Save\("C:\\tmp\\creta-mice-crop.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); $src.Dispose\(\); "ok")

PowerShell($doc = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/mice-linee-guida-ai" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $search = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/search?q=claude" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $componi = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/componi" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $sj = $search.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "DOC: $\($doc.StatusCode\) | COMPONI: $\($componi.StatusCode\) | SEARCH: $\($search.StatusCode\), docs=$\($sj.docs.Count\), sections=$\($sj.sections.Count\)")

PowerShell($body = '{"title":"Smoke Test Compose","items":[{"slug":"mice-linee-guida-ai"}]}'; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/compose" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; $j = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; "COMPOSE: $\($r.StatusCode\), slug=$\($j.slug\)"; $del = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/documents/$\($j.slug\)" -Method DELETE -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; "DELETE: $\($del.StatusCode\)"; $del2 = try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/documents/$\($j.slug\)" -Method DELETE -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30\).StatusCode } catch { $_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__ }; "DELETE bis \(atteso 404\): $del2")

PowerShell($ok = $false; for \($i = 0; $i -lt 30; $i++\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/scrivi" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; $ok = $true; break } catch { Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 } }; if \($ok\) { "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "Scrivi un nuovo documento"\) { "FORM OK" } else { "FORM MISSING" }; if \($r.Content -match "Aggiungi capitolo"\) { "CHAPTERS OK" } else { "CHAPTERS MISSING" } } else { "SERVER NOT REACHABLE" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -Confirm:$false }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "ancora attivo" } else { "spento" })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -Confirm:$false }; if \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\) { "ancora attivo" } else { "spento" })
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const sz=fs.statSync\('logomice.png'\).size; console.log\('png bytes', sz\);")
